profile.name: Kadali Naga Sri Krishna
profile.tagline: Python Developer | AI & Backend Enthusiast | Cloud & DevOps Learner
profile.specialization: Backend, AI Systems, DevOps, and Product Engineering
profile.aboutHeading: Building projects and learning by creating.
profile.bio: I enjoy building software and AI-based projects using Python and modern web technologies. I have worked on projects involving AI applications, IoT systems, and interactive web platforms. I am currently learning more about cloud technologies, DevOps, and software development while improving my problem-solving and project-building skills.

projects.title: AI-Powered Medical Diagnostic Platform
projects.subtitle: Live AI Healthcare Report Analysis
projects.description: Built a web app where users upload medical reports and receive AI-generated insights through the Google Gemini API. Added JWT and bcrypt authentication, stored patient records in PostgreSQL, and used Socket.io for real-time updates.

projects.title: AI-Based Warehouse Robot Simulation
projects.subtitle: Live Autonomous Robot Pathfinding Dashboard
projects.description: Simulated autonomous warehouse robots navigating a grid using BFS pathfinding with dynamic obstacle re-routing. Built a live dashboard for task completion, travel distance, and multi-robot collision avoidance metrics.

projects.title: DataZen
projects.subtitle: AI Deepfake Detection Platform
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered deepfake detection web application using Python and Flask. Built REST APIs and a responsive dashboard for media analysis and detection results.

projects.title: Smart Waste Management and Sanitation System
projects.subtitle: IoT Waste Monitoring System
projects.description: Developed an IoT-based waste monitoring system using Arduino and ultrasonic sensors. Designed a sensor-based solution to improve waste collection and sanitation management.

education.institution: Swarnandhra College of Engineering and Technology

education.program: Board of Intermediate Education Andhra Pradesh
Board of Secondary Education Andhra Pradesh

achievements.title: NSS Secretary
achievements.summary: Organized social service activities and college-level events.
achievements.description: Served as NSS Secretary and helped organize social service activities, special camp sessions, plantation programs, awareness events, and college-level initiatives. Recognized for contribution, coordination, and active participation in community-focused NSS work.

achievements.title: ATL Mentorship
achievements.summary: Completed a 3-day workshop and mentored school students in hands-on innovation activities.
achievements.description: Participated in the ATL Mentorship Programme for Higher Education Institution students at JNTUK, Kakinada. Worked with students through practical sessions on electronics, tools, soldering, Arduino basics, and innovation-focused learning activities.

certifications.title: GenAI Powered Data Analytics Job Simulation
certifications.summary: Hands-on virtual job simulation focused on AI-driven data analytics and collections strategy.
certifications.description: Completed a hands-on virtual job simulation focused on AI-driven data analytics and collections strategy. Worked on exploratory data analysis, customer risk profiling, predictive delinquency modeling using AI, and business storytelling for decision-making. Gained practical experience in applying GenAI concepts to real-world financial and collections workflows while developing data-driven problem-solving and analytical thinking skills.

certifications.title: Python Essentials 1
certifications.summary: Cisco Networking Academy verified badge recognizing foundational proficiency in Python programming.
certifications.description: Successfully completed the Python Essentials 1 certification program focused on core Python programming fundamentals. Learned problem-solving through algorithms, Python syntax and semantics, debugging, script development, and foundational software development concepts. Built a strong understanding of programming logic, control structures, functions, and the Python Standard Library for real-world application development. Earned an official verified badge from Cisco Networking Academy recognizing foundational proficiency in Python programming, algorithmic thinking, debugging, and software development basics.

certifications.title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Management
certifications.summary: Elite certified 12-week NPTEL program with a consolidated score of 75%.
certifications.description: Successfully completed the NPTEL-certified course Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Management offered by IIT Madras. Gained foundational knowledge in AI concepts, machine learning applications, data-driven decision-making, and the role of AI in modern business and management strategies. Developed an understanding of how AI technologies can optimize operations, improve analytics, and support intelligent business solutions. Earned an Elite Certification with a consolidated score of 75% in the 12-week NPTEL program, demonstrating strong performance in assignments and proctored examinations.

certifications.title: Foundation for Virtual and Augmented Reality Systems
certifications.summary: Elite certified 12-week NPTEL program with a consolidated score of 75%.
certifications.description: Successfully completed the NPTEL-certified course Foundation for Virtual and Augmented Reality Systems offered by IIT Guwahati. Learned the core concepts of Virtual Reality (VR) and Augmented Reality (AR), including immersive technologies, 3D interaction systems, rendering fundamentals, tracking techniques, and real-world applications of XR technologies across industries. Earned an Elite Certification with a consolidated score of 75% in the 12-week NPTEL program, demonstrating strong understanding and performance in VR/AR system fundamentals and practical assessments.

certifications.title: Red Hat Linux Fundamentals (RH104)
certifications.summary: Completed 16 credit hours of practical Linux fundamentals and command-line training.
certifications.description: Completed the Getting Started with Linux Fundamentals (RH104 - RHA) training program by Red Hat. Learned core Linux concepts including command-line operations, file system navigation, user and permission management, package handling, process management, and essential system administration basics. Developed foundational skills for working in Linux-based development and enterprise environments. Successfully completed 16 credit hours of Red Hat training focused on practical Linux fundamentals and command-line proficiency.

certifications.title: Apply AI: Analyze Customer Reviews
certifications.summary: Verified Cisco badge for AI-assisted customer review analysis and data-processing workflows.
certifications.description: Completed the Apply AI: Analyze Customer Reviews course focused on using AI tools and data analysis techniques to process and interpret customer feedback. Learned how to work with tabular data using AI-assisted tools, apply spreadsheet-based analysis, create data-processing workflows, and use AI chatbots to automate and support decision-making processes. Developed practical skills in AI-powered customer insights and human-in-the-loop evaluation systems. Earned an official verified badge recognizing practical skills in AI-assisted customer review analysis, data processing, spreadsheet automation, and AI-supported business decision workflows.
